languages.text:
Deal 1 impact damage to a target and pull it to a nearby cell. If the target is bigger than you, you're pulled instead. If you have melee weapon equipped, perform an attack afterwards. If dual-wielding melee weapons, attack with both of them, but with -50% damage.
Range -- {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13}

traits.locale_text:
Deal 1 impact damage to a target and pull it to a nearby cell. If the target is bigger than you, you're pulled instead. If you have melee weapon equipped, perform an attack afterwards. If dual-wielding melee weapons, attack with both of them, but with -50% damage.
Range -- {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13}

languages.text: The user deals 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} cells and pulls that enemy to themselves. If the enemy is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that enemy instead. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy. If they have two weapons equipped, they attack with both of them, but each deals −50% less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Deal 1 impact damage to a target and pull it to a nearby cell. If the target is bigger than you, you're pulled instead. If you have melee weapon equipped, perform an attack afterwards. If dual-wielding melee weapons, attack with both of them, but with -50% damage.
Range -- {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13}

traits.locale_text: The user deals 1 impact damage to a target within {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} cells and moves it to a cell adjacent to themselves. If the target is larger than the user, the user is moved to a cell adjacent to it instead. If the user has a melee weapon equipped, they attack the target. If they have two weapons equipped, they attack with both of them, but each deals −50% less damage.

The user deals 1 impact damage to a target within {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} cells and moves it to a cell adjacent to themselves. If the target is larger than the user, the user is moved to a cell adjacent to it instead. If the user has a melee weapon equipped, they attack the target. If they have two weapons equipped, they attack with both of them, but each deals −50% less damage.

If they have two weapons equipped, they attack with both of them, but each deals −50% less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.

The user deals 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to a target within {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} cells and moves it to a cell adjacent to themselves. If the target is larger than the user, the user is moved to a cell adjacent to it instead. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack the target. If they have two weapons equipped, they attack with both of them, but each deals −50% less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.

languages.text: Обладатель аугмента наносит 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}ударный урон{/g} противнику в пределах {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} клеток и подтягивает его к себе. Если этот противник больше обладателя аугмента, то вместо этого он подтягивает обладателя аугмента к себе. Если у обладателя аугмента экипировано оружие {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ближнего боя{/g}, он атакует этого противника. Если у него экипировано два оружия, он атакует обоими, но каждое наносит на 50% меньше {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урона{/g}.
languages.original_text: The user deals 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} cells and pulls that enemy to themselves. If the enemy is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that enemy instead. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy. If they have two weapons equipped, they attack with both of them, but each deals −50% less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Обладатель аугмента наносит 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}ударный урон{/g} цели в пределах {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} клеток и перемещает ее на соседнюю с собой клетку. Если цель больше обладателя аугмента, вместо этого сам обладатель аугмента перемещается на соседнюю с ней клетку. Если у обладателя аугмента экипировано оружие {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ближнего боя{/g}, он атакует цель. Если у него экипировано два оружия, он атакует обоими, но каждое наносит на 50% меньше {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урона{/g}.

Обладатель аугмента наносит 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}ударный урон{/g} цели в пределах {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} клеток и перемещает ее на соседнюю с собой клетку. Если цель больше обладателя аугмента, вместо этого сам обладатель аугмента перемещается на соседнюю с ней клетку. Если у обладателя аугмента экипировано оружие {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ближнего боя{/g}, он атакует цель. Если у него экипировано два оружия, он атакует обоими, но каждое наносит на 50% меньше {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урона{/g}.

languages.text: El usuario inflige 1 de {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}daño de impacto{/g} a un enemigo en un radio de {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} casillas y lo atrae hacia sí mismo. Si el enemigo es de mayor tamaño que el usuario, en vez de eso atrae al usuario hacia el enemigo. Si el usuario empuña un arma {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}cuerpo a cuerpo{/g}, ataca al enemigo. Si empuña dos armas a la vez, ataca con ambas, pero cada una inflige un 50 % menos de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daño{/g}.
languages.original_text: The user deals 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} cells and pulls that enemy to themselves. If the enemy is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that enemy instead. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy. If they have two weapons equipped, they attack with both of them, but each deals −50% less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: El usuario inflige 1 de {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}daño de impacto{/g} a un enemigo en un radio de {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} casillas y lo atrae hacia sí mismo. Si el enemigo es de mayor tamaño que el usuario, en vez de eso atrae al usuario hacia el enemigo. Si el usuario empuña un arma {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}cuerpo a cuerpo{/g}, ataca al enemigo. Si empuña dos armas a la vez, ataca con ambas, pero cada una inflige un 50 % menos de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daño{/g}.

languages.text: Der Nutzer fügt einem Gegner in einem Radius von {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} Feldern 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}Aufprallschaden{/g} zu und zieht ihn zu sich. Ist der Gegner größer als der Nutzer, wird Letzterer zum Gegner gezogen. Hat der Nutzer eine {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampfwaffe{/g} ausgerüstet, attackiert er diesen Gegner. Hat er zwei Waffen ausgerüstet, greift er mit beiden Waffen an, verursacht aber mit jeder Waffe −50 % weniger {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}Schaden{/g}.
languages.original_text: The user deals 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} cells and pulls that enemy to themselves. If the enemy is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that enemy instead. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy. If they have two weapons equipped, they attack with both of them, but each deals −50% less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Der Nutzer fügt einem Gegner in einem Radius von {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} Feldern 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}Aufprallschaden{/g} zu und zieht ihn zu sich. Ist der Gegner größer als der Nutzer, wird Letzterer zum Gegner gezogen. Hat der Nutzer eine {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampf{/g}waffe ausgerüstet, attackiert er diesen Gegner. Hat er zwei Waffen ausgerüstet, greift er mit beiden Waffen an, verursacht aber mit jeder Waffe −50 % weniger {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}Schaden{/g}.

languages.text: Kullanıcı, en fazla {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} hücre uzaktaki bir düşmana 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}darbe hasarı{/g} verir ve o düşmanı kendisine doğru çeker. Bu düşman, kullanıcıdan büyükse onun yerine kullanıcı, düşmana çekilir. Kullanıcı, {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş{/g} silahı kuşanmışsa o düşmana saldırır. İki silah birden kuşanmışsa her ikisiyle birlikte saldırır ancak her biri %50 daha az {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasar{/g} verir.
languages.original_text: The user deals 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} cells and pulls that enemy to themselves. If the enemy is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that enemy instead. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy. If they have two weapons equipped, they attack with both of them, but each deals −50% less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Kullanıcı, en fazla {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} hücre uzaktaki bir düşmana 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}darbe hasarı{/g} verir ve o düşmanı kendisine doğru çeker. Bu düşman, kullanıcıdan büyükse onun yerine kullanıcı, düşmana çekilir. Kullanıcı, {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş{/g} silahı kuşanmışsa o düşmana saldırır. İki silah birden kuşanmışsa her ikisiyle birlikte saldırır ancak her biri %50 daha az {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasar{/g} verir.

languages.text: L'utilisateur inflige 1 point de {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}dégâts d'impact{/g} à un ennemi dans un rayon de {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} cases et l’attire vers dans sa direction. Si cet ennemi est plus grand que lui, les rôles s'inversent et c'est l'utilisateur qui est attiré. S'il est équipé d'une arme de {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}mêlée{/g}, il attaque l'ennemi. S'il est équipé de deux armes, il attaque avec les deux simultanément, mais chacune inflige des {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} réduits de −50 %.
languages.original_text: The user deals 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} cells and pulls that enemy to themselves. If the enemy is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that enemy instead. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy. If they have two weapons equipped, they attack with both of them, but each deals −50% less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: L'utilisateur inflige 1 point de {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}dégâts d'impact{/g} à un ennemi dans un rayon de {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} cases et l’attire vers dans sa direction. Si cet ennemi est plus grand que lui, les rôles s'inversent et c'est l'utilisateur qui est attiré. S'il est équipé d'une arme de {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}mêlée{/g}, il attaque l'ennemi. S'il est équipé de deux armes, il attaque avec les deux simultanément, mais chacune inflige des {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} réduits de −50 %.

languages.text: 使用者对{uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13}格内的一名敌人造成1点{g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}冲击伤害{/g}，并将该敌人拉向自身。如果该敌人体型大于使用者，则改为将使用者拉向该敌人。如果使用者装备了{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战{/g}武器，则会攻击该敌人。如果使用者装备了两把武器，则使用两把武器同时攻击，但每把武器的{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}降低50%。
languages.original_text: The user deals 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} cells and pulls that enemy to themselves. If the enemy is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that enemy instead. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy. If they have two weapons equipped, they attack with both of them, but each deals −50% less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 使用者对{uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13}格内的一名敌人造成1点{g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}冲击伤害{/g}，并将该敌人拉向自身。如果该敌人体型大于使用者，则改为将使用者拉向该敌人。如果使用者装备了{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战{/g}武器，则会攻击该敌人。如果使用者装备了两把武器，则使用两把武器同时攻击，但每把武器的{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}降低50%。

languages.text: 使用者は{uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} セル以内にいる対象に{g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}衝撃ダメージ{/g} を 1 回与え、その対象を自分に隣接するセルに移動させる。対象が使用者より大きい場合、使用者はその代わりに隣接するセル に移動する。使用者が{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近接武器{/g} を装備している場合、その対象を攻撃する。武器を2つ装備している場合、両方の武器で攻撃するが、それぞれ与える{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}ダメージが-50％減少する{/g} 。
languages.original_text: The user deals 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to a target within {uip|Range|ea8fc10fdb544dbf9b8e25c0f1defc13} cells and moves it to a cell adjacent to themselves. If the target is larger than the user, the user is moved to a cell adjacent to it instead. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack the target. If they have two weapons equipped, they attack with both of them, but each deals −50% less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
